channel.title: BSHmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BSHmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Innovative Supply Chains Are Shifting From Competition To Collaboration
item.description: Companies are replacing transactional, competitive supply chains with collaborative partnerships to boost resilience, efficiency and long-term innovat...

item.title: Every AI Model Is Saying The Same Thing. That Should Terrify You.
item.description: AI systems are converging on the same answers. Here's what that means for your business, your culture, and the $242 billion bet nobody is questioning.

item.title: OnePlus Watch 4: Top Spec Wear OS Watch You May Never Be Able To Buy
item.description: A OnePlus Watch 4 has quietly been revealed on the OnePlus website, but it's not yet clear which territories will actually see a release of the Wear O...

item.title: 3 Ways To Stress-Proof Your Personality, By A Psychologist
item.description: It’s time we stopped looking at stress resilience as a mysterious, unique superpower. Here are three ways you can become less vulnerable to stress.

item.title: The Carbon Removal Market Was Built On One Customer. Now What?
item.description: The voluntary carbon market is in crisis. But the real story isn't Microsoft's pause — it's the deeper shift from abstract offsets to real-world decar...

item.title: Consumers outnumber producers
item.description: New technology often upends the careers of experienced professionals. When the Mac offered typesetting to the masses, typographers were incensed. They...

item.title: The banal djinni
item.description: Technology changes things. Sometimes better, sometimes worse. When a powerful new technology arrives, it offers us wishes. Too often, we waste them, a...

item.title: The right sort of friction
item.description: If we remove impediments that are in the way of where our customers seek to go, they support us. But when we remove the friction that gives people tra...

item.title: Is it sciatica?
item.description: Sometimes, back pain is felt in the thighs or even the ankles. But treating the part that hurts does nothing to address the real problem. Most busines...

item.title: The Petrillo complications
item.description: 80 years ago, the most important person in the music business was James Petrillo. It’s difficult to imagine the head of the musician’s union on the co...
